The Dancer Sets the Beat

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: What does the bomba do that the cumbia does not?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. What is the girl trying to do by sharing what Mateo wrote about her bomba? What is the girl trying to show when she explains how the dancer changes the rhythm?
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  MU:Pr4.2.8a  |  MS Music Grade 8: Comparing musical structure across contrasting pieces
